changes.newValue:
1. Inspect current mission sequencing and identify the cleanest place to add InSight as a mission step.
2. Implement InSight integration in the daily mission flow without regressing archive or story progression rules.
3. Add automated coverage: unit tests for InSight puzzle logic or submission validation, and e2e coverage for the mission path.
4. Run build, lint, and targeted tests; update task notes and completion state.

snapshot.title: Integrate InSight into daily mission flow and add test coverage
snapshot.description: Fold the InSight Weather Desk into the main mission loop, preserve archive/story rules, and add unit/e2e coverage for mission selection and submission behavior. Related: @doc/guides/insight-weather-desk

acceptanceCriteria.text: Daily mission flow can serve InSight as a mission game without breaking archive/story progression
Unit tests cover InSight puzzle generation or submission logic
E2E tests cover the player path for InSight in the daily mission flow

newValue.text: Daily mission flow can serve InSight as a mission game without breaking archive/story progression

E2E tests cover the player path for InSight in the daily mission flow

changes.newValue: InSight fully integrated: insight in MISSION_GAMES, rendered in renderActiveGame(), API routes at /api/insight/daily+submit with day-access guard. Unit tests (insight.test.ts, mission.test.ts) and e2e (insight-mission-flow.cy.ts) all pass. Added vitest.config.ts with @/ alias so unit tests resolve correctly.
